parameters.query:
INSERT INTO message_status_events
  (twilio_message_sid, message_status, error_code, raw_payload, received_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageSid }}',
  '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageStatus }}',
  {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.ErrorCode ? "'" + $('Webhook').item.json.body.ErrorCode + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($('Webhook').item.json.body).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  NOW()
);

BEGIN;

WITH best_status AS (
  SELECT
    e.twilio_message_sid,
    (SELECT message_status
       FROM message_status_events e2
      WHERE e2.twilio_message_sid = e.twilio_message_sid
      ORDER BY CASE message_status
                 WHEN 'delivered'    THEN 5
                 WHEN 'failed'       THEN 5
                 WHEN 'undelivered'  THEN 5
                 WHEN 'sent'         THEN 4
                 WHEN 'queued'       THEN 3
                 WHEN 'accepted'     THEN 2
                 ELSE 1
               END DESC,
               received_at DESC
      LIMIT 1) AS best,
    -- The received_at of the row we just selected, so we can use it as the timestamp
    (SELECT received_at
       FROM message_status_events e2
      WHERE e2.twilio_message_sid = e.twilio_message_sid
      ORDER BY CASE message_status
                 WHEN 'delivered'    THEN 5
                 WHEN 'failed'       THEN 5
                 WHEN 'undelivered'  THEN 5
                 WHEN 'sent'         THEN 4
                 WHEN 'queued'       THEN 3
                 WHEN 'accepted'     THEN 2
                 ELSE 1
               END DESC,
               received_at DESC
      LIMIT 1) AS best_at
  FROM message_status_events e
  GROUP BY e.twilio_message_sid
)
UPDATE messages m
   SET twilio_status = bs.best,
       sent_at = COALESCE(m.sent_at,
                  CASE WHEN bs.best IN ('sent','delivered') THEN bs.best_at END),
       delivered_at = COALESCE(m.delivered_at,
                       CASE WHEN bs.best = 'delivered' THEN bs.best_at END),
       failed_at = COALESCE(m.failed_at,
                    CASE WHEN bs.best IN ('failed','undelivered') THEN bs.best_at END)
  FROM best_status bs
 WHERE m.twilio_sid = bs.twilio_message_sid
   AND m.direction = 'outbound'
   AND m.twilio_status NOT IN ('delivered','failed','undelivered','canceled')
   AND bs.best != m.twilio_status;

UPDATE messages
   SET twilio_status     = '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageStatus }}',
       twilio_error_code = COALESCE(
         {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.ErrorCode ? "'" + $('Webhook').item.json.body.ErrorCode + "'" : 'NULL' }},
         twilio_error_code
       ),
       sent_at      = COALESCE(sent_at,
                       CASE WHEN '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageStatus }}' IN ('sent','delivered')
                            THEN NOW() END),
       delivered_at = COALESCE(delivered_at,
                       CASE WHEN '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageStatus }}' = 'delivered'
                            THEN NOW() END),
       failed_at    = COALESCE(failed_at,
                       CASE WHEN '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageStatus }}' IN ('failed','undelivered')
                            THEN NOW() END)
 WHERE twilio_sid = '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageSid }}'
   AND twilio_status NOT IN ('delivered','failed','undelivered')
  RETURNING id;

UPDATE messages
   SET twilio_status     = '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageStatus }}',
       twilio_error_code = COALESCE(
         {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.ErrorCode ? "'" + $('Webhook').item.json.body.ErrorCode + "'" : 'NULL' }},
         twilio_error_code
       ),
       sent_at      = COALESCE(sent_at,
                       CASE WHEN '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageStatus }}' IN ('sent','delivered')
                            THEN NOW() END),
       delivered_at = COALESCE(delivered_at,
                       CASE WHEN '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageStatus }}' = 'delivered'
                            THEN NOW() END),
       failed_at    = COALESCE(failed_at,
                       CASE WHEN '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageStatus }}' IN ('failed','undelivered')
                            THEN NOW() END)
 WHERE twilio_sid = '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageSid }}'
   AND twilio_status NOT IN ('delivered','failed','undelivered')
  RETURNING id;
